data.title: Visual Storytelling
data.description: Promotes visual content as the primary mode of storytelling and engagement.
data.technical_spec: Features like Stories, Reels, and IGTV focus on visual content.

data.title: Community Building
data.description: Fosters a sense of community among users through features like comments, hashtags, and live interactions.
data.technical_spec: Algorithm-driven content recommendations and user connection suggestions.

data.title: Innovation
data.description: Continuously innovates with new features to keep user engagement high.
data.technical_spec: Regular updates incorporating AR, shopping, and integrated partner APIs.

data.title: Inclusivity
data.description: Efforts to include diverse user demographics through accessibility features.
data.technical_spec: Options for image alt text, captions, and customization settings.

data.title: Influencer Marketing
data.description: Central to brand strategy, leveraging influencer collaborations for increased reach.
data.technical_spec: Tools for influencer analytics and partnership programs.
